name: @runtimed/node-win32-x64-msvc
description: Windows x64 MSVC native N-API binding for @runtimed/node.

scripts.prepack: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('runtimed-node.win32-x64-msvc.node')) { console.error('Run pnpm --dir packages/runtimed-node assemble:platform before packing @runtimed/node-win32-x64-msvc.'); process.exit(1); }"
